description_long: This is an upright piano with a dark, rich wooden finish and ornate gold detailing on the front panel and lower section. The keyboard features a standard arrangement of white and black keys, and the piano has two visible pedals at the base. The front panel above the keys is decorated with elegant scrollwork, adding a touch of classical style. The back of the piano is plain and solid, while the sides are thick and robust, supporting the instrument's substantial structure. The top surface is flat and broad, suitable for placing small objects. The overall appearance is traditional and refined, suitable for both indoor and sheltered outdoor urban environments.
description: A dark wood upright piano with ornate gold detailing, a full keyboard, and two pedals. The design is traditional and elegant, with a solid, robust build.
description_view_0: Side view showing the piano's depth, thick wooden side panel, and the protruding keyboard section.
description_view_1: Front view displaying the full keyboard, ornate gold detailing, and two pedals beneath the keys.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, similar to view 0, highlighting the piano's depth and solid side construction.
description_view_3: Rear view showing a plain, unadorned wooden back panel with a broad, flat top.
attribute_keyboard_layout: Standard keyboard with approximately 52 white keys and 36 black keys in alternating groups, arranged in a traditional piano layout.
